mechanism_narrative: Higher 3-month growth in retail sales signals strengthening household demand and upward earnings revisions, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if the 3-month RSAFS growth signal has Rank IC below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window or if high-growth quintiles do not outperform low-growth quintiles over 20 trading days.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid rise in the federal funds rate tightens discount rates and funding conditions, reducing equity valuation multiples and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS crosses above its trailing 12-month average or rises > 0.50pp over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if triggered tightening episodes produce positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of walk-forward cases or if the average triggered return is not below baseline at p < 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: A rising unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor income and recession risk, lowering expected corporate revenues and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if UNRATE-triggered episodes do not have lower 60-day forward returns than non-triggered episodes, or if the sign is positive in more than 60% of triggered observations.

mechanism_narrative: Declining industrial production signals weakening real output and operating leverage, lowering near-term earnings expectations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if negative INDPRO triggers fail to predict lower 20-day S&P 500 returns than baseline in walk-forward tests or if triggered returns are positive in more than 60% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Payroll gains combined with a falling unemployment rate confirm broad labor-market improvement, supporting income growth and risk appetite and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if the joint PAYEMS-positive and UNRATE-falling condition does not outperform either single-series signal over 60 trading days or if its walk-forward Rank IC is below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer prices while the policy rate is not falling signals inflation pressure without offsetting easing, raising real-income and margin risks and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 6-month growth crosses above its trailing 24-month average and FEDFUNDS 3-month change >= 0
failure_condition: Reject if the CPIAUCSL-FEDFUNDS interaction does not produce lower 20-day returns than CPIAUCSL alone, or if triggered observations have positive returns in more than 60% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp fall in housing starts signals weaker construction demand, credit sensitivity, and future durable-goods weakness, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST downside triggers do not precede below-baseline 60-day S&P 500 returns or if the downside trigger has a nonnegative average forward return after transaction-date alignment.

mechanism_narrative: Positive short-run momentum in industrial production signals improving factory utilization and cyclical earnings momentum, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if positive INDPRO momentum has Rank IC below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window or if top-quintile INDPRO momentum fails to outperform bottom-quintile momentum over 5 trading days.
